modules.name: Scout Pod
modules.description: A cramped one-seater with good forward visibility.

modules.name: Standard Bridge
modules.description: Reliable command center with balanced crew space and sensors.

modules.name: Armored Command
modules.description: Thick-walled bridge with a narrow viewing slit. Built like a bunker.

modules.name: Wide Bridge
modules.description: Panoramic cockpit with excellent situational awareness.

modules.name: Command Tower
modules.description: Vertically oriented bridge with superior sensor placement.

modules.name: Observation Dome
modules.description: Glass-heavy design with unmatched visibility for deep space survey.

modules.name: Stealth Helm
modules.description: Recessed, low-profile cockpit that barely breaks the hull line.

modules.name: War Bridge
modules.description: Reinforced tactical center with integrated targeting systems.

modules.name: Racing Cockpit
modules.description: Ultra-flat, aerodynamic design. Speed is the only defense.

modules.name: Luxury Suite
modules.description: Spacious command cabin with climate control and diplomatic seating.

modules.name: Split Canopy
modules.description: Dual viewport design for pilot and weapons officer.

modules.name: Jury-Rigged Bridge
modules.description: Bolted together from salvage. Functional, if you squint.

modules.name: Light Thruster
modules.description: Compact and efficient. Gets you where you need to go.

modules.name: Standard Drive
modules.description: Workhorse propulsion for mid-size vessels.

modules.name: Foundry Heavy Drive
modules.description: Massive thrust output from a rugged industrial powerplant.

modules.name: Racing Afterburner
modules.description: All exhaust, minimal housing. Burns hot and fast.

modules.name: Wide Thruster Array
modules.description: Broad bank of nozzles for maximum even thrust distribution.

modules.name: Twin Nacelle
modules.description: Dual-column engines with hull between. Balanced thrust profile.

modules.name: Split Engine
modules.description: Gap-center design for distinctive silhouette and heat dispersal.

modules.name: Tapered Nozzle
modules.description: Narrowing exhaust for focused thrust at the cost of spread.

modules.name: Micro Thruster
modules.description: Tiny maneuvering jet. Place several for coverage.

modules.name: Whisper Drive
modules.description: Low-signature propulsion that barely registers on sensors.

modules.name: Efficient Drive
modules.description: Precision-engineered for maximum fuel economy.

modules.name: Vectored Thrust
modules.description: Adjustable nozzle angles for superior maneuverability.

modules.name: Ion Array
modules.description: Electric-blue ion stream. Steady, efficient, unmistakable.

modules.name: Scrapyard Burner
modules.description: Runs on hope and recycled fuel. Somehow still works.

modules.name: Capital Powerplant
modules.description: Industrial-scale propulsion for the largest vessels.

modules.name: Light Hardpoint
modules.description: A small weapon mount. Better than nothing.

modules.name: Talon Hardpoint
modules.description: Precision-engineered weapon platform with improved targeting.

modules.name: Turret Platform
modules.description: Rotating weapon mount with wider firing arcs.

modules.name: Heavy Weapons Bay
modules.description: Oversized weapon housing for capital-class ordinance.

modules.name: Missile Rack
modules.description: Vertical launch tubes for guided munitions.

modules.name: Broadside Battery
modules.description: Wide, flat weapon bank for devastating lateral fire.

modules.name: Twin-Link Mount
modules.description: Paired barrels for rapid synchronized fire.

modules.name: Spinal Cannon
modules.description: Ship-length weapon that runs along the centerline. Devastating but inflexible.

modules.name: Wing-Tip Pod
modules.description: Compact mount designed for extremity placement.

modules.name: Quad Mount
modules.description: Four barrels, one platform. Overwhelming firepower.

modules.name: Concealed Bay
modules.description: Recessed weapon housing with minimal visual signature.

modules.name: Point Defense
modules.description: Small rapid-fire mount for anti-missile work.

modules.name: Dorsal Turret
modules.description: Elevated weapon position with excellent coverage.

modules.name: Forward Battery
modules.description: Flat, wide-bore weapon bank for head-on engagements.

modules.name: Torpedo Tube
modules.description: Long, narrow launcher for heavy guided munitions.

modules.name: Rapid-Fire Mount
modules.description: Compact, high-cyclic weapon platform for sustained fire.

modules.name: Junkyard Cannon
modules.description: Welded from wreckage. It fires. That counts.

modules.name: Basic Emitter
modules.description: Entry-level shield projection. Thin but better than bare hull.

modules.name: Standard Generator
modules.description: Solid shield coverage with decent regeneration.

modules.name: Sable Compact Node
modules.description: Small but effective. Place several for distributed coverage.

modules.name: Fortress Projector
modules.description: Massive shield generator for capital-class protection.

modules.name: Directional Barrier
modules.description: Flat emitter array projecting shields primarily in one direction.

modules.name: Shield Dome
modules.description: Rounded emitter geometry for even omnidirectional coverage.

modules.name: Phase Barrier
modules.description: Stealth-compatible shielding that barely registers on scanners.

modules.name: Heavy Projector
modules.description: Thick emitter bank for ships that plan to take hits.

modules.name: Ring Emitter
modules.description: Hollow-center design with omnidirectional projection.

modules.name: Layered Barrier
modules.description: Multiple emitter rows for redundant shield coverage.

modules.name: Patchwork Emitter
modules.description: Scavenged shield hardware. Flickers sometimes.

modules.name: Small Hold
modules.description: Compact cargo space for essential supplies.

modules.name: Standard Bay
modules.description: Decent cargo volume for the working trader.

modules.name: Wide Hold
modules.description: Broader bay for bulky cargo that does not stack well.

modules.name: Bulk Freighter Bay
modules.description: Industrial-scale cargo storage. The backbone of commerce.

modules.name: Tall Hold
modules.description: Vertical bay that fits narrow hull designs.

modules.name: Mega Container
modules.description: The largest cargo module money can buy. All commerce, no combat.

modules.name: Refrigerated Hold
modules.description: Temperature-controlled bay for perishable goods.

modules.name: Smuggling Compartment
modules.description: Hidden cargo space. Scan-resistant by design.

modules.name: Modular Rack
modules.description: External-mount cargo frame. Cheap storage at the cost of exposure.

modules.name: Standard Quarters
modules.description: Adequate living space with basic life support.

modules.name: Bunk Room
modules.description: Minimal crew space. Functional, not comfortable.

modules.name: Barracks
modules.description: High-density crew housing. Military efficiency, zero luxury.

modules.name: Officer Cabin
modules.description: Private quarters that boost crew morale.

modules.name: Luxury Suite
modules.description: Spacious living quarters with amenities. Attracts the best crew.

modules.name: Compact Quarters
modules.description: Space-efficient crew module for streamlined hulls.

modules.name: Extended Hab
modules.description: Long crew section for vessels with deep-space endurance.

modules.name: Hammock Bay
modules.description: Strung-up sleeping space. At least it has air.

modules.name: Compact Reactor
modules.description: Minimal power plant. Keeps the lights on.

modules.name: Standard Reactor
modules.description: Reliable power generation for most configurations.

modules.name: Heavy Reactor
modules.description: High-output industrial power core. Heavy but dependable.

modules.name: Overcharged Core
modules.description: Runs hot. More power per kilogram than anything else.

modules.name: Efficient Cell
modules.description: Compact, clean energy. Maximum output per unit weight.

modules.name: Capital Reactor
modules.description: Ship-core power generation for the largest vessels.

modules.name: Shielded Core
modules.description: Extra hull layering around the reactor. Heavier, safer.

modules.name: Micro Reactor
modules.description: Tiny supplemental power source for stealth builds.

modules.name: Sensor Array
modules.description: Detection suite for improved scanning and targeting.

modules.name: Small Fuel Tank
modules.description: Extra fuel reserves for longer voyages.

modules.name: Large Fuel Tank
modules.description: Substantial fuel reserves for extended expeditions.

modules.name: Extended Fuel Tank
modules.description: Long, narrow tank that fits along the spine.

modules.name: Medical Bay
modules.description: Treatment facility for crew injuries and recovery.

modules.name: Workshop
modules.description: On-board repair facility with basic fabrication tools.

modules.name: Refinery Pod
modules.description: Compact ore processing facility for in-flight refining.

modules.name: Brig
modules.description: Reinforced holding cells for prisoners and bounties.

modules.name: Science Lab
modules.description: Analysis equipment for anomalies and artifacts.

modules.name: Communications Array
modules.description: Long-range signal equipment for trading intel and distress calls.

modules.name: Drone Bay
modules.description: Launch and recovery platform for utility drones.

modules.name: Navigation Computer
modules.description: Advanced route optimization for fuel-efficient travel.

modules.name: EW Suite
modules.description: Electronic warfare systems for jamming and deception.

modules.name: Tractor Beam
modules.description: Gravitational projector for salvage hauling.

modules.name: Life Support
modules.description: Extended atmospheric processing for long voyages.

modules.name: Escape Pod
modules.description: Emergency crew evacuation system. Mandatory on some routes.

modules.name: Crew Lounge
modules.description: Recreation space that keeps crew sharp on long hauls.

modules.name: Hull Connector
modules.description: Small structural link between modules.

modules.name: Hull Beam
modules.description: Long structural beam for spine or wing spar construction.

modules.name: Reinforced Bulkhead
modules.description: Heavy structural section. Resists severing damage.

modules.name: Small Plate
modules.description: Compact rectangular hull section.

modules.name: Medium Plate
modules.description: Standard hull section with good coverage.

modules.name: Large Plate
modules.description: Broad hull section for capital-class construction.

modules.name: Small Block
modules.description: Square structural module for tight spaces.

modules.name: Large Block
modules.description: Solid square hull section.

modules.name: L-Section
modules.description: Corner piece for non-rectangular hull layouts.

modules.name: T-Section
modules.description: Junction piece for branching hull structures.

modules.name: Cross Section
modules.description: Four-way structural junction.

modules.name: Long Beam
modules.description: Extended structural beam for wing spars and keels.

modules.name: Wing Spar
modules.description: Angled piece designed for swept wing construction.

modules.name: Nose Point
modules.description: Triangular bow piece for aerodynamic profiles.

modules.name: Swept Section
modules.description: Angled hull piece for swept-back wing designs.

modules.name: Armored Plate
modules.description: Heavy structural section with extra damage resistance.

modules.name: Lightweight Frame
modules.description: Low-mass structural piece for evasion-focused builds.

modules.name: Wing Panel
modules.description: Wide, thin piece for wing surfaces.

modules.name: Tail Fin
modules.description: Vertical stabilizer for stern structures.

modules.name: Angled Connector
modules.description: Diagonal structural link for non-orthogonal layouts.

modules.name: Wide Plate
modules.description: Broad structural section for hull coverage.

modules.name: Narrow Connector
modules.description: Slim linking piece for tight connections.

modules.name: Nexus Trade Terminal
modules.description: Guild-certified market terminal. Real-time commodity feeds from the Central Exchange.
modules.discovery_flavor: Only sold at Nexus Prime. Guild seal of authenticity included.

modules.name: Guild Customs Seal
modules.description: Pre-cleared cargo documentation module. Expedites inspections at Guild-aligned stations.
modules.discovery_flavor: Issued exclusively at Nexus Prime. The seal opens doors.

modules.name: Hydroponic Bay
modules.description: Living cargo hold lined with growth substrate. Perishable goods last longer in transit.
modules.discovery_flavor: Grown, not built, at Verdant's agri-labs.

modules.name: Verdant Life Module
modules.description: Crew quarters with integrated greenery. Fresh air and growing things keep spirits high.
modules.discovery_flavor: The walls breathe. Literally. Standard at Verdant, exotic everywhere else.

modules.name: Forge Repair Rig
modules.description: On-board welding and patching station. The Union way: fix it yourself, fix it right.
modules.discovery_flavor: Forged at Forgeworks. Smells like ozone and honest work.

modules.name: Slag-Tempered Plate
modules.description: Structural section heat-treated in Forgeworks slag furnaces. Tougher than standard Foundry plate.
modules.discovery_flavor: Tempered in the Main Foundry's slag pits. You can feel the heat in the metal.

modules.name: Prospector's Scanner
modules.description: Tuned for mineral signatures in dense asteroid fields. A Breakstone miner's best friend.
modules.discovery_flavor: Calibrated for Breakstone's asteroid belt. Finds what corporate scanners miss.

modules.name: Rock Rat Pod
modules.description: Cramped, reinforced cockpit built for asteroid operations. No comfort, all function.
modules.discovery_flavor: Standard issue for Breakstone independent miners. Ugly, but you will survive the rock strike.

modules.name: Axiom Analysis Core
modules.description: Peer-reviewed sensor algorithms running on dedicated hardware. Sees what others theorize about.
modules.discovery_flavor: Published in the Axiom Journal of Applied Sensing. License included with purchase.

modules.name: Experimental Lattice
modules.description: High-regen, low-capacity shield prototype. Recovers fast but shatters under sustained fire.
modules.discovery_flavor: Still technically a prototype. The paperwork says 'field trial,' not 'product.'

modules.name: Garden Quarters
modules.description: Crew space woven with climbing vines and filtered sunlight. Rest here actually restores you.
modules.discovery_flavor: Seeds sourced from Haven's orbital gardens. Every cabin smells of rain and green.

modules.name: Mediator Array
modules.description: Long-range diplomatic communications suite. Broadcasts good faith on all frequencies.
modules.discovery_flavor: Haven's Rest believes every conflict starts with a failure to communicate.

modules.name: Wrecker's Haul Bay
modules.description: Reinforced cargo hold with magnetic clamps for salvaged wreckage. Smells like old battles.
modules.discovery_flavor: Built from the wreckage of the wreckage. Recursive salvage at its finest.

modules.name: Scrapyard Turret
modules.description: Welded from three different weapon systems. Somehow, the combination works better than any original.
modules.discovery_flavor: Three guns became one at the Wrecker's Outpost. Nobody knows why it fires straight, but it does.

modules.name: Grand Bazaar Hold
modules.description: Climate-controlled luxury cargo bay with anti-vibration mounting. For goods that deserve better.
modules.discovery_flavor: Commissioned at the Grand Bazaar. Comes with a certificate of cargo excellence.

modules.name: Stellaris VIP Suite
modules.description: First-class crew accommodations with private viewports and climate zones. Attracts top talent.
modules.discovery_flavor: The gold standard in crew comfort. Literally gold-trimmed at Stellaris Port.

modules.name: Pressure-Rated Hull
modules.description: Deep-core certified structural plate. Tested at pressures that would crush standard alloy.
modules.discovery_flavor: Stamped 'DEEP CORE CERTIFIED' at Iron Depths. The stamp alone costs 500 credits.

modules.name: Deep Bore Mount
modules.description: Heavy weapon housing reinforced for recoil in dense gravity fields. Steady as stone.
modules.discovery_flavor: The Iron Depths teach you one thing: when you fire, do not miss. This mount helps.

modules.name: Nova Prototype Drive
modules.description: Experimental high-efficiency engine running classified fuel mixtures. Quiet, fast, questionably legal.
modules.discovery_flavor: Nova Research's latest. The patent is pending. The performance is not.

modules.name: Classified Sensor Suite
modules.description: Sensor array running algorithms that do not officially exist. What it finds, it keeps quiet about.
modules.discovery_flavor: Nova Research will deny this module exists. Your sensor readings say otherwise.

modules.name: The King's Repeater
modules.description: Salvaged from the Corsair King's flagship. Twin-linked barrels with a hair-trigger cycling mechanism that sometimes fires twice before you release. The pirate fleets feared this weapon's staccato roar. Now it roars for you.
modules.discovery_flavor: Pried from the wreckage of the Corsair King's bridge. The barrels are still warm.

modules.name: Void Maw Reactor
modules.description: The Void Leviathan's heart. It pulses with absorbed starlight and the death-screams of a dozen ships. Converts incoming damage into stored void charge that can be unleashed as a devastating pulse. The reactor hums at a frequency that makes your teeth ache.
modules.discovery_flavor: You cut it from the Leviathan's core. It fought you even then. The void does not surrender willingly.

modules.name: Forgeborn Bulwark
modules.description: The Iron Maw's shield array, ripped from its carcass while the metal was still glowing. Crystalline lattices that harden under sustained bombardment. Every hit makes it tougher. Every volley makes it angrier. The foundry workers who helped you extract it crossed themselves and refused to touch it.
modules.discovery_flavor: Still hot. The Iron Maw's shield was its curse and its gift. Now it is yours.

modules.name: The Collection Engine
modules.description: The Collector's central processing hub. A masterwork of parallel systems engineering that cycles weapons and shields faster than any human crew could manage. Reduces all equipment cooldowns and grants a single moment of impossible speed: two actions in one turn, once per battle. The Collector used it to acquire everything. Now you use it to keep what matters.
modules.discovery_flavor: The Collector's engine room was a museum of stolen technology. You took the best piece.

modules.name: Phantom Shroud
modules.description: Hull plating infused with the Ledger Phantom's phase-shift technology. Every few seconds, the ship flickers out of normal space. Sensors lose lock. Weapons pass through empty air. For one heartbeat, you are a ghost, just like the Phantom was. The plating feels cold. Sometimes your hand passes through it. Do not think about what that means.
modules.discovery_flavor: The Phantom dissolved when you destroyed it. This plating was all that remained. It still flickers.
